overall.description: Aerial flight through a rain-soaked cyberpunk metropolis at night, navigating between towering skyscrapers with neon signage and glass facades. The footage appears to be from Cyberpunk 2077, showing a vehicle flying through the cityscape while following another vehicle and descending through urban canyons.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial corridor between downtown skyscrapers in heavy rain

events.description: accelerating while following the illuminated vehicle ahead through the downpour
heavy rain streaks temporarily obscure the view of the target vehicle

agents.ego_description: piloting a flying vehicle through heavy rain, maintaining pursuit of a vehicle with glowing red taillights

notable_agents.action: futuristic car with glowing red taillights flying ahead through the rain, maintaining distance from ego

entered.detail: flying car with bright red taillights being pursued through the rainy cityscape
illuminated advertisement displaying '20%' in yellow text on dark background
tall building with blue-lit windows rising into the rain clouds
dark building facade with minimal lighting on the right side of the corridor

segments.scene_description: Flying through a heavy downpour in a futuristic city, following a vehicle with glowing red taillights. Digital billboards and towering skyscrapers with blue-lit windows line the aerial corridor while rain streaks across the viewport.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow gap between concrete high-rise buildings

events.description: entering narrow corridor between close building walls, losing sight of open sky
passing extremely close to concrete wall on left side, filling the frame

agents.ego_description: maneuvering through tight spaces between buildings, maintaining speed while navigating close proximity obstacles

entered.detail: rough concrete building wall passing by within meters of the camera
building window with horizontal blinds partially open revealing interior
large industrial ventilation system mounted on the adjacent building

segments.scene_description: Navigating through a narrow gap between concrete high-rises, with building surfaces passing by closely on both sides. The previously followed vehicle is no longer visible as the camera enters tighter urban spaces with industrial ventilation structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial district with large billboards and glass atriums

events.description: passing the VERGIL and PURE OVERKILL billboards on building walls
flying past brightly lit glass building interior with teal lighting illuminating the rain

agents.ego_description: flying past commercial advertisements and glass-walled buildings, maintaining steady altitude through the commercial district

entered.detail: large advertisement with yellow 'PURE OVERKILL' text and white chalk outline graphic
yellow neon sign with stylized 'VERGIL' text mounted on building
massive building with transparent teal-lit interior offices visible through glass facade
flat roof with square white tile pattern below the flight path

segments.scene_description: Flying through a commercial district featuring prominent billboards including 'PURE OVERKILL' and 'VERGIL'. Passing alongside a massive glass building with illuminated teal interior offices visible through the curtain walls, while rain continues to fall heavily.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower urban canyon with neon signage and overpasses

events.description: descending into narrower street canyon with overhead concrete structures
passing the large red Tyger Claws neon sign with tiger graphic

agents.ego_description: descending through an urban canyon, passing under concrete overpasses and alongside neon-lit building facades toward street level

entered.detail: large red neon sign with tiger graphic and Asian characters reading 'TYGER CLAWS'
elevated highway or walkway structure passing overhead
multiple illuminated advertisements at lower building levels visible in the canyon

segments.scene_description: Descending into a dense urban canyon beneath concrete overpasses, passing the prominent red Tyger Claws neon sign. The environment becomes more enclosed with street-level neon advertisements visible on surrounding buildings as the camera moves toward ground level.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial descent through a rain-soaked cyberpunk metropolis, transitioning from high-altitude corridors into the claustrophobic depths of an urban canyon. It begins by trailing a vehicle with glowing red taillights through a heavy downpour, flanked by towering skyscrapers and blue-lit digital billboards. As the camera pushes forward, the lead vehicle vanishes and the space tightens, navigating a narrow gap between concrete high-rises and industrial ventilation structures. The scene then opens into a commercial district, gliding past massive glass facades with teal-lit offices and prominent billboards for Pure Overkill and Vergil before diving beneath concrete overpasses. Finally, the camera descends toward ground level, passing a red Tyger Claws neon sign as the environment becomes fully enclosed by street-level advertisements.
